title: HIV.Prevention
description: This tab describes the data that are collected during HIV prevention activities (not covered in the previous business processes)

resourceType.description: Resource type identifier for HIVPrevention logical model

@context.description: JSON-LD context for this logical model with ValueSet vocabularies

anyOf.description: URI reference to external JSON-LD context

@type.description: JSON-LD type identifier for HIVPrevention logical model

atElevatedRiskForHivAcquisition.description: Client is at elevated risk for HIV acquisition, defined according to country/programme context

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.PRV.DE2

hivPreventionIntervention.description: HIV prevention intervention that client accessed

otherHivPreventionIntervention.description: Client accessed other HIV prevention services (specify)

dateAccessedHivPreventionIntervention.description: Date the client accessed HIV prevention intervention

hivStatusOfContact.description: The HIV status of the client's contact

dateInjectingEquipmentProvided.description: Date client was provided with injecting equipment

numberOfNeedlesSyringesProvided.description: Number of needles-syringes provided to client

dateOamtInitiated.description: Date client initiated opioid agonist maintenance treatment (OAMT)

dateOamtDoseReceived.description: Date client received opioid agonist maintenance treatment (OAMT) dose

dateOamtTakeAwayDosesDispensed.description: Date the client was dispensed opioid agonist maintenance treatment (OAMT) take-away dose(s)

currentlyOnOamt.description: Client is currently on opioid agonist maintenance treatment (OAMT) at reporting date, defined according to country/program to account for medication dispensed and LTFU criterion

retainedOnOamt.description: Client is retained on opioid agonist maintenance treatment (OAMT) at reporting date, defined according to country/program to account for medication dispensed and LTFU criterion

clientBeingInductedOnOamt.description: Client is currently being inducted on opioid agonist maintenance treatment (OAMT), defined according to country/program

clientOnReducingDosesOfOamt.description: Client is current on reducing doses of opioid agonist maintenance treatment (OAMT), defined according to country/program

dateFirstMaintenanceDoseReceived.description: First date on which client received maintenance dose

dateOfLossToFollowUpOrOamtStopped.description: Date of loss to follow-up or opioid agonist maintenance treatment (OAMT) stopped

dateMedicationsDispensed.description: Date the client was dispensed medications

dateMedicationsPrescribed.description: Date the client was prescribed medications

numberOfDaysPrescribed.description: Days of medication client has been prescribed
